full_prompt: Design a monolithic 22-gauge (0.85 mm) G90 galvanized sheet-steel supply-air plenum for a variable-air-volume AHU serving the university HVAC plenum benchmark project building, meeting ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2022 (IEQ), 55-2023 (thermal comfort), 90.1-2022 (energy), and 189.1-2020 (high-performance). The plenum is treated as a single welded sheet-metal body (no slip-and-drive joints for this CAD prompt; integral welded corners). Rectangular cross section 800 mm x 500 mm, plenum axial length 1500 mm, one 600 mm x 400 mm main supply inlet on one end face, three 300 mm diameter round branch takeoff collars on the top, two 250 x 200 mm side takeoffs (left and right). The plenum is internally lined on the floor and two side walls with 25 mm fiberglass duct liner (k = 0.034 W/m-K, NRC 0.80, not part of the CAD body but its effect on acoustic and thermal BCs is applied). Bounding envelope 900 x 600 x 1600 mm. Material 22 ga G90 galvanized ASTM A653 CS Type B with yield 230 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, Young's modulus 200 GPa, Poisson's ratio 0.30, density 7850 kg/m^3, coating mass 275 g/m^2. Design basis: AHU supply flow 4500 L/s (9534 CFM) at 750 Pa static pressure, air temp 13 C cooling and 35 C heating, building neutral pressure +12 Pa. Per SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards 4th Ed. pressure class 2 inch WG (500 Pa), leakage class 6, the plenum is operating at the pressure-class boundary (750 Pa) so must be reinforced to Class 3 (750 Pa / 3 in WG). Three load cases. Load Case 1 (operating): internal +750 Pa gauge at 13 C, ambient building side 20 C, AHU fan shut-off spike to +1000 Pa for 10 seconds. Load Case 2 (negative fault): internal -500 Pa gauge (return-fan fail in reverse) at 20 C, evaluating panel collapse. Load Case 3 (seismic import): horizontal 0.4g base acceleration per ASCE 7-22 Section 13.3 for mechanical equipment in a Seismic Design Category D building, with plenum self-weight and internal 1000 Pa pressure concurrent. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 operating + shutoff spike, peak von Mises in the panel or at any stiffener must not exceed 115 MPa (yield / 2.0 per SMACNA duct-construction allowable); (R2) under LC1 the maximum lateral panel deflection of any unreinforced panel shall not exceed L/120 where L is the clear panel span (SMACNA 4th Ed. Section S1.11 deflection limit); (R3) under LC2 external collapse, a linear buckling eigenvalue analysis must yield a first-mode load factor of at least 3.0; (R4) under LC3 seismic, peak stress shall not exceed 207 MPa (yield / 1.11 for R_p = 2.5 and Omega = 2.0 per ASCE 7 nonstructural components); (R5) a CFD analysis of LC1 at 4500 L/s must show outlet branch-to-branch flow imbalance of at most 15% and total plenum pressure drop below 50 Pa; (R6) a steady-state thermal analysis must show no condensation risk on the external surface when chilled supply air 13 C is inside and ambient 25 C / 60% RH is outside (dew point 16.7 C): external surface temperature must remain above 17 C; (R7) total plenum mass must not exceed 65 kg to fit the AHU room floor loading allowance. Radiation analysis is not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a welded 22-gauge (0.85 mm) G90 galvanized sheet-steel supply-air plenum for a variable-air-volume AHU serving a university HVAC plenum benchmark building, compliant with ASHRAE 62.1-2022 / 55-2023 / 90.1-2022 / 189.1-2020 and SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards (4th Ed., Pressure Class 3 / 750 Pa with leakage Class 6). Rectangular cross section with one 600 x 400 mm main inlet, three 300 mm round top branch collars, two 250 x 200 mm side takeoffs. 25 mm fiberglass internal liner applied only as an acoustic / thermal BC, not part of the CAD body. Mass <= 65 kg. Allowables: SMACNA yield/2.0 on panel stress, SLS deflection L/120, ASCE 7-22 nonstructural component yield/1.11 seismic (Rp 2.5, Omega 2.0), external-collapse buckling SF 3.0.

Envelope: 800 x 500 mm cross section x 1500 mm length (inside 900 x 600 x 1600 mm).

Load cases.
- LC1 operating with shutoff spike: +750 Pa gauge steady at 13 C, spike to +1000 Pa for 10 s; L/120 deflection limit on unreinforced panels.
- LC2 return-fan fault: -500 Pa gauge at 20 C (external collapse check).
- LC3 seismic: 0.4 g horizontal base acceleration per ASCE 7-22 Sect. 13.3 (SDC D), concurrent with +1000 Pa internal.
- Plus steady-state CFD at 4500 L/s (imbalance <= 15%, pressure drop <= 50 Pa) and a condensation-prevention thermal check (13 C inside, 25 C / 60% RH outside, dew point 16.7 C -- external surface >= 17 C).

prompt.title: 22-ga galvanized AHU plenum for university HVAC plenum benchmark
prompt.brief: Rectangular 800x500 plenum with 1 main inlet + 3 round top branches + 2 side takeoffs; SMACNA Class 3 (750 Pa) with 25 mm internal liner.

material.name: 22-ga G90 galvanized ASTM A653 CS Type B

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: shell (SHELL181 or S4) for sheet metal

exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Not a dominant mode in conditioned room.
exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Not the SMACNA governing case; AHU vibration isolated at fan base.

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: Acoustic NC rating per ASHRAE Handbook Applications
